data.name: Makiatto

weaponImprint.name: Bittersweet Caramel
weaponImprint.trait: Attacks ignore 10% of the target's defense. If the target has Freeze debuffs, ignore an additional 10% of its defense.
weaponImprint.effect: Increases Freeze damage dealt by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. For every 4/4/3/3/2/2 instances of damage dealt outside of own turn, increase damage dealt by the next active attack by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increase damage dealt to Paradeus by 2.5%. If the target has [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae], increase it by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A calm, proud, yet awkward Doll who isn't good at expressing herself. She loves fluffy little animals and overly sweet macchiatos. Always a loner, her gaze often lingers somewhere. When will she finally get the response she's been longing for?

skills.name: Lone Wolf Territory
skills.description: Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Battlefield Insight
skills.description:
Increases critical rate by 40% and reduces critical damage by 10%. At the start of the turn, if this unit’s HP exceeds 80%, gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] and [effect:bf6a0f32-41d4-476f-baa0-79e0728f0564] until the next turn.

When attacking a target with [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae], ignores 4 points of stability index and increases damage dealt to them by 20%. When attacking a target with [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc], ignores 6 points of stability index and increases damage dealt to them by 30%. These effects cannot stack.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Increases critical rate by 40% and reduces critical damage by 10%. At the start of the turn, if this unit’s HP exceeds 80%, gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] and [effect:bf6a0f32-41d4-476f-baa0-79e0728f0564] until the next turn.

When attacking a target with [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae], ignores 4 points of stability index and increases damage dealt to them by 20%; if Freeze damage is dealt, ignores 6 points of stability index instead. When attacking a target with [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc], ignores 6 points of stability index and increases damage dealt to them by 30%; if Freeze damage is dealt, ignores 10 points of stability index instead. These effects cannot stack.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Increases critical rate by 40% and reduces critical damage by 10%. At the start of the turn, if this unit’s HP exceeds 80%, gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] and [effect:bf6a0f32-41d4-476f-baa0-79e0728f0564] until the next turn.

When attacking a target with [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae], ignores 4 points of stability index and increases damage dealt to them by 20%. When attacking a target with [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc], ignores 6 points of stability index and increases damage dealt to them by 30%. When dealing Freeze damage to an enemy target with [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae] or [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc], ignores 10 points of stability index instead and increases damage dealt by 30%. These effects cannot stack.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: When dealing Freeze damage to an enemy target with [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae], increases the stability index ignored to 6 points. When dealing Freeze damage to an enemy target with [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc], increases the stability index ignored to 10 points.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When dealing Freeze damage to an enemy target with [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae] or [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc], increases the stability index ignored to 10 points and damage dealt by 30%.

skills.name: Cold Precision Shot
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles and deals Freeze damage equal to 160% of attack. Increases the critical damage of this attack by 30%. Gains 1 stack of [effect:52b8af4d-b768-4550-be55-be8a4a3eaa44] for each instance of damage dealt.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 enemy target within 9 tiles of self and perform 2 attacks dealing Freeze damage equal to 100% of attack. Gain 1 stack of [effect:52b8af4d-b768-4550-be55-be8a4a3eaa44] for each instance of damage dealt. If the first attack crits, increase the critical rate of the second attack by 100% and the critical damage by 80%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Perform two attacks, critical damage will no longer increase, and the damage dealt is decreased to 100% of attack. If the first attack crits, the critical rate of the second attack is increased by 100%, and the critical damage is increased by 80%.

skills.name: Professional Tactics
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles of self, deal Physical damage equal to 130% of attack, gain 4 points of Confectance Index, and gain 2 stacks of [effect:2d93b666-7349-4094-bc7a-6e22b8e76a1a].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles of self, deal Physical damage equal to 130% of attack, gain 4 points of Confectance Index, and gain 2 stacks of [effect:44e8c6d5-e66f-464e-a854-626654fa9395].

skills.name: Absolute Mental Defense
skills.description: Gains [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] and [effect:a352a0e9-b085-4f6d-8bb9-fda0b496a801] for 2 turns. The absorption amount of [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] is equal to 65% of the initial attack, but cannot exceed 60% of max HP.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Gains [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] and [effect:a352a0e9-b085-4f6d-8bb9-fda0b496a801] for 2 turns. The absorption amount of [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] is equal to 80% of this unit's initial attack, but cannot exceed 80% of max HP.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Gains [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] and [effect:a352a0e9-b085-4f6d-8bb9-fda0b496a801] for 2 turns. [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] absorbs damage up to 80% of base attack, capped at 80% of max HP. After using this skill, gains 2 points of Confectance Index at the end of each action. This can be triggered 2 times.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The absorption amount of [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] is increased to 80% of this unit's initial attack, and the cap is increased to 80% of max HP. The number of [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800] triggered is increased by 1 time per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: After using Absolute Mental Defense, gains 2 points of Confectance Index at the end of the action. This effect can be triggered 2 times. [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800] can be triggered once more each turn. If the [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800] deals a critical hit, gains [effect:f9c50d26-807b-4f80-a636-5f13ae7097aa] for 1 turn.

keys.effect: At the start of the action, if own HP is greater than 80%, reduces stability damage taken from attacks by 2 points. This can trigger at most once per turn.

Critical damage of Interceptions is increased by 30%.

When Absolute Mental Defense is active, gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] and refunds Confectance Index consumed by the attack with said Extra Command. If the target of extra attacks is a Boss unit, inflicts [effect:1e13643b-d0e3-4e67-a86f-cd08221264f2] for 2 turns.
When the active skill Cold Precision Shot results in a kill, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 2 - Iced with Milk Foam

keys.effect: After using the active skill Professional Tactics, if there are no other allied units within 3 tiles, gains 1 stack of [effect:937acdbc-f0d7-44aa-92e4-15be9d684985].

When using Lone Wolf Territory, Cold Precision Shot, or Professional Tactics over a Freeze tile, cleanses all Freeze debuffs from self and gains 3 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 4 - Time for a Break

keys.effect: At the start of the battle, applies [effect:fbecd0e1-7852-4164-a9cc-d2fdd69724e4] to the enemy unit with the highest HP.
Increases attack by 10% at the start of the battle. This effect lasts until HP drops below 100% for the first time.

vertebrae.effect: Perform two attacks, critical damage will no longer increase, and the damage dealt is decreased to 100% of attack. If the first attack crits, the critical rate of the second attack is increased by 100%, and the critical damage is increased by 80%.

doll.name: Makiatto
doll.effects: A calm, proud, yet awkward Doll who isn't good at expressing herself. She loves fluffy little animals and overly sweet macchiatos. Always a loner, her gaze often lingers somewhere. When will she finally get the response she's been longing for?

[effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] absorbs damage up to 80% of base attack, capped at 80% of max HP. After using this skill, gains 2 points of Confectance Index at the end of each action. This can be triggered 2 times.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by Interceptions is increased by 8%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Freeze damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt against enemy units that are more than 5 tiles away is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: When an enemy within 9 tiles attempts to attack this unit with [effect:abce6753-fe29-4ca3-b487-7453e982b279] active, launches [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800] against the enemy target, dealing Freeze damage equal to 90% of attack, 2 points of stability damage, and applies [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae] for 1 turn. Can be activated a maximum of 2 times per turn. This effect cannot be cleansed.
Attack is increased by 10%, maximum of 3 stacks. This effect will be nullified when using skills other than the active skill Cold Precision Shot. Cannot be cleansed.
AoE damage taken is reduced by the current stack count x 25%. Each instance of AoE damage consumes 1 stack, with a stacking maximum of 3 stacks. This is considered a buff.

Before using an active attack, apply to the target stacks of [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae] equal to the number of attacks made, lasts for 1 turn. Activates 1 time. This buff cannot be cleansed.

Immune to [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae] and [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc]. Increase incoming Freeze damage from Makiatto by 20%. If phase weakness is exploited, this effect is increased to 30%. This effect cannot be cleansed.
Damage dealt is increased by 7.5%, stacking up to 4 times. Cannot be cleansed.
Reduce AoE damage taken by 25%. Each instance of AoE damage taken consumes 1 stack. Maximum of 3 stacks. This is considered a buff.
Mobility increased by 1 tile, immune to displacement effects from enemy units. Cannot be cleansed.
Damage taken from Makiatto is increased by 15%. Considered a debuff, cannot be cleansed.
